compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: inline duct fans, exhaust fans, shutter fans
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI targeting, temperature, humidity, VPD triggers; schedule, timer, dual-zone monitoring
compatible_devices.notes: Eight independent AC outlets, 1800W max total. Device must auto-start when powered. AI targeting learns environment patterns and proactively adjusts. EU users need NEMA-to-Schuko plug adapter; 100-240V compatible.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: CLOUDLINE S, CLOUDLINE T, CLOUDLINE Pro
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CLOUDLINE S6, CLOUDLINE T6, CLOUDLINE Pro T6
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI targeting, temperature, humidity triggers; schedule, timer
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only via AC outlet; EC variable speed control not available. For full speed modulation use a UIS controller (Controller AI+). Fan must be connected via its AC power cord, not UIS port.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: any auto-start LED fixture (Mars Hydro, Spider Farmer, HLG, Viparspectra, etc.)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI targeting, schedule, timer, temperature triggers
compatible_devices.notes: Lighting explicitly listed as compatible. On/off only; no dimming control. For dimming capability, use a UIS controller (Controller AI+) with RJ11/12 adapter dongle. Light must auto-start when powered.
On/off via schedule or timer. Ballast must auto-start when AC power is applied. Avoid rapid cycling; minimum restart interval recommended to prevent ballast damage.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AQUAOASIS Cool Mist, Honeywell HEV620, IDEAL-AIR, Britsou
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI targeting, humidity triggers; schedule, timer, dual-zone monitoring
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only; no mist intensity control. Tested compatible brands: AQUAOASIS, HONEYWELL, IDEAL-AIR, BRITSOU, DE'LONGHI. Device must auto-start when powered with no manual button press required.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI targeting, humidity triggers; schedule, timer, dual-zone monitoring
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only. Tested compatible brands: GE, FRIGIDAIRE, LEVOAIR, YAUFEY, BLACK+DECKER. Device must auto-start when powered; units that revert to standby after power interruption are not compatible.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Lasko ceramic, Opolar, Pelonis, iPower, AC Infinity THERMOFORGE T3
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI targeting, temperature triggers; schedule, timer, dual-zone monitoring
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only; no heat level adjustment. Tested brands: LASKO, OPOLAR, PELONIS, IPOWER. Device must auto-start when powered. AC Infinity THERMOFORGE T3 limited to on/off (10-level PTC control requires UIS controller).

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, timer (optional CO2 sensor add-on enables CO2-level triggers)
compatible_devices.notes: CO2 systems explicitly listed as compatible. Without CO2 sensor add-on, control is schedule/timer-based only. Optional CO2 sensor (sold separately) enables ppm-based triggering. Dedicated AC Infinity CO2 Controller recommended for CO2-specific setups.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: water pumps, reservoir pumps, irrigation pumps
compatible_devices.notes: Water pumps explicitly listed as compatible. On/off via schedule or cycle. Pump must auto-start when powered. Eight outlets allow simultaneous control of multiple pumps.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: clip-on fans, oscillating fans, desk fans
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: AI targeting, temperature triggers; schedule, timer
compatible_devices.notes: Fans explicitly listed as compatible. On/off only; no speed control. Device must auto-start when powered. Eight outlets allow multiple fans with independent programming.
